caption: A man with light brown hair wearing a dark blue t-shirt is visible in a small rectangular webcam overlay in the lower-left corner of the screen, positioned in front of a decorated Christmas tree. The main screen displays a gaming interface with a red background and the text "ULTIMATE TEAM" repeated at the top and bottom. A naming menu is open, featuring the heading "ITEM NAME" above a text entry box and a virtual QWERTY keyboard. In the first frame, the text box contains "randa|". As the sequence progresses, the characters are deleted one by one. By the second frame, it reads "ran|", the third "ra|", and finally, the fourth frame shows an empty text box "|". Throughout this process, the "e" key on the virtual keyboard remains highlighted in yellow. The keyboard includes options such as "EXIT", "BACK", "CAPS", "CLEAR", "SPACE", and "DONE".
